title: Club Auction</br>Models Donated by Paul Morgan
text: As many of you know, Paul Morgan, our previous secretary, has relocated to Crawley and as a generous parting gift, he has donated his collection of models to the club to help with fundraising.
Among the highlights are two 'bundles', the Tundra and the Uno Wot Trainer — each including batteries and accessories, making them an ideal starting point for anyone looking to get into the hobby.

You'll have the next two weeks, right up to Friends and Family Day, to take a good look at everything on offer. If something catches your eye, you can place a silent bid by contacting Doug. The auction will then be brought to a close on Friends and Family Day itself.
Any items that remain unsold afterward will be listed on an online auction site, with all proceeds continuing to support the club.
